recap: Created fzf-options-files.zsh lib that self-sources fzf-options-base and fzf-options-prompt-directory, exposing fzf-options-files(scriptName, searchPath) with all required options.
Updated ctrl-p and ctrl-shift-p to delegate fzf-options() to fzf-options-files(); added SEARCH_PATH to ctrl-shift-p; source order aligned; --nth=1,2 dropped.
